caption: A person's hands are shown interacting with a white tray and a gold-colored box on a table in a setting that appears to be a sports card breaking studio. The person, wearing a short-sleeved shirt, uses their hands to move the gold box within the tray. In a picture-in-picture window, a man with a beard wearing a dark blue t-shirt with a yellow circular logo is visible, looking toward the table. The background contains various card-related accessories and boxes. The text "JASPYS LIVE" and "CASEBREAKS.COM" is prominently displayed as an overlay on the screen, along with another "JASPYS" logo featuring "Sports Cards & More" underneath. Across the sequence, the person's hand enters the frame to grasp and shift the gold box toward the edge of the white tray, transitioning from a centered position to being pushed aside.
